case_title: SASS, GEORGE R. VS VIACOM CABLEVISION, INC. et al

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SASS, GEORGE R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIACOM CABLEVISION, INC. YU, TIM $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $521.00, DEFENDANT, TIM YU IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
